title: Bump to v5.2.0-rc1
body:
This is off a branch to ensure our automation works, but I do not consider v5.2 branched at this time; we'll merge main back into it at least once more before RC2.

No release notes this time, either, those will wait for RC2.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: Because we're merging main back in, we should avoid setting main to v5.3.0-dev until next RC

Well, we discovered an interesting little feature of Cirrus: `changesInclude('version/rawversion/*`)` does not trigger when it's a two-commit NOP PR. I [don't see any way to solve this](https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/).
I guess one way to solve it could be to add a step to the release procedures, "make a tiny whitespace or other silly nonsense to version.go"

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I'm going to push the manual merge button as I accidentally pushed the tag early
